name: 29) Thai Marinated Grilled Steak
method: Place the steaks into the marinade. Move the steak around to make sure it's coated properly. Let it marinate (refrigerated) for at least 3 hours (better if overnight). When done, remove steak from the refrigerator and let it rest for 1 hour.

Place the steaks into the marinade. Move the steak around to make sure it's coated properly. Let it marinate (refrigerated) for at least 3 hours (better if overnight). When done, remove steak from the refrigerator and let it rest for 1 hour.
Add onions and chili flakes into the bowl. Don't worry if lumps of sugar don’t dissolve.
Add onions and chili flakes into the bowl. Don't worry if lumps of sugar don’t dissolve.
Add the rice powder (Step 8) and coriander into the sauce (Step 6). You may serve the steak with the Nam Jim Jeaw dipping sauce or keep the Nam Jim Jeaw dipping sauce for future use.
Add the rice powder (Step 8) and coriander into the sauce (Step 6). You may serve the steak with the Nam Jim Jeaw dipping sauce or keep the Nam Jim Jeaw dipping sauce for future use.
